candidates.label: Fragmentary posts
candidates.description: Short status updates that consist of a single word or brief fragment with minimal punctuation.

citations.text: Warning! Pork skin bandit is on the loose!

candidates.scope_note: Observed only in this batch; may not generalize to other data.
candidates.boundary_note: Other longer, complete sentences are common, so this pattern does not cover all posts.

candidates.label: I just statements
candidates.description: Personal updates that begin with 'I just' followed by a clause describing an event or action.

citations.text: I just found out that Bob Seeger's dad died. RIP Pete.
I just bought 4 gallons of milk because it's going to snow. I don't drink milk so I'm not sure what I'm gonna do with it.
I just watched "10 videos you won't believe." I believed every one of them. Prize?

candidates.scope_note: Appears multiple times in this batch; may be coincidental.
candidates.boundary_note: Not every post starting with 'I' follows this structure, limiting its generality.

candidates.label: External link posts
candidates.description: Status updates that include at least one URL to an external site.

citations.text: As discussed earlier this week. This is Zack's band. I guess they do have some stuff on the interweb. http://babetones.bandcamp.com/
Bought a house during lunch. Like a Boss. http://youtu.be/eSQVij6Fny4

candidates.scope_note: Found only a few occurrences in this batch.
candidates.boundary_note: Other posts may reference external content without a link, so this pattern is not exhaustive.
